title: Budgeted Expenditures, Iran, 1955/56-1959/60 (World Bank, 1960)
source_org: International Bank for Reconstruction and Development (World Bank)
source_url: https://openknowledge.worldbank.org (World Bank Archives, Iran country documents)
extraction_method: MANUAL TRANSCRIPTION, not bulk download. Original document is a 1960 scanned World Bank report (data/raw/world-bank-archives-iran/historical-documents/1960_current_economic_position_and_prospects.pdf) with a poor-quality OCR text layer (garbled digits in places). Every value in this file was verified by rendering the exact source page (Table 10, page 45) to a high-resolution PNG (pdftoppm -r 200) and visually reading the table directly from the image. The image was clean and unambiguous throughout. As a cross-check, the 1955/56 column of line items (4500+728+841+390+2111+309+425+519+581+840+3582) was summed and confirmed to equal the printed Total budgeted expenditure of 14,826. No value was interpolated, estimated, or fabricated.
license_terms: World Bank Archives — public disclosure authorized document
notes: Source document: data/raw/world-bank-archives-iran/historical-documents/1960_current_economic_position_and_prospects.pdf — Table 10, page 45, source: Ministry of Finance, Teheran. 1959/60 is a budgeted (not yet actual) year, so 'Actual expenditure' is blank for that column in the source. Total/Actual figures for 1958/59 exclude 'Special Expenditures' covered entirely by 'Special Revenues' of Rls. 1.2 billion per footnote 1/. Part of a systematic effort to extract Pahlavi-era (esp. 1941-1960) data from primary-source PDFs already in data/raw/.
